<!--
PR title format:

gh-<issue-number> [<type>]: <summary>

Examples:
- gh-12 [docs]: Add contribution guidelines
- gh-18 [feat]: Add PostgreSQL raw data schema

Types: feat, fix, docs, refactor, test, style, perf, build, ci, chore
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this pull request change? -->

## Related Links

<!-- Use Closes/Fixes/Resolves when this PR should close an issue. Use Refs for related context. -->

- Closes #
- Refs #

<!-- Select the areas touched by this PR. -->

- [ ] Scheduling
- [ ] Collection
- [ ] Computation

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Security

## Implementation Notes

<!-- Key decisions, boundaries, migrations, or tradeoffs. -->

## Verification

<!-- Commands, screenshots, manual checks, or reasons verification is not applicable. -->

- [ ] Tests or checks were run
- [ ] Documentation was updated or is not required
- [ ] Database/configuration impact was reviewed
- [ ] Security and secret exposure risk was reviewed
